Description: (Typically Well Name of Multi Well Plate). Name of the image series. Combination of parent name and image name (e.g. ParentName_ImageName).
Original cell identifier assigned during segmentation.
The tile number within a multi-tile image acquisition. (field number in Well)
Total number of granules detected within the entire cell area.
Number of granules detected specifically within the nucleus region.
Number of granules detected specifically within the cytoplasm region.
Total area of the cell in square micrometers (µm²).
X coordinate (column) of the top-left corner of the bounding box around the cell region in micrometers (µm).
Y coordinate (row) of the top-left corner of the bounding box around the cell region in micrometers (µm).
Width of the bounding box around the cell region in micrometers (µm).
Height of the bounding box around the cell region in micrometers (µm).
Mean pixel intensity of the granules fluorescence channel across the entire cell area.
Total summed intensity of the granules fluorescence channel across the entire cell area.
Area of the nucleus region in square micrometers (µm²).
Mean pixel intensity of the nuclear stain channel within the nucleus region.
Total summed intensity of the nuclear stain channel within the nucleus region.
X coordinate (column) of the nucleus centroid in micrometers (µm).
Y coordinate (row) of the nucleus centroid in micrometers (µm).
X coordinate (column) of the top-left corner of the bounding box around the nucleus region in micrometers (µm).
Y coordinate (row) of the top-left corner of the bounding box around the nucleus region in micrometers (µm).
Width of the bounding box around the nucleus region in micrometers (µm).
Height of the bounding box around the nucleus region in micrometers (µm).
Mean intensity of the granules fluorescence channel measured within the nucleus region.
Total summed intensity of the granules fluorescence channel within the nucleus region.
Area of the cytoplasm region (cell minus nucleus) in square micrometers (µm²).
Mean intensity of the granules fluorescence channel measured within the cytoplasm region.
Total summed intensity of the granules fluorescence channel within the cytoplasm region.
Mean area of all granule objects detected within the entire cell in square micrometers (µm²).
Mean of the individual granule mean intensities for all granules within the entire cell.
Mean circularity of all granule objects detected within the entire cell. Circularity ranges 0 (elongated) to 1 (perfect circle).
Mean solidity of all granule objects detected within the entire cell. Solidity is the ratio of the object area to its convex hull area (0 to 1).
Mean area of all granule objects detected within the cytoplasm region in square micrometers (µm²).
Mean of the individual granule mean intensities for all granules within the cytoplasm region.
Mean circularity of all granule objects detected within the cytoplasm region. Circularity ranges 0 (elongated) to 1 (perfect circle).
Mean solidity of all granule objects detected within the cytoplasm region. Solidity is the ratio of the object area to its convex hull area (0 to 1).
Mean area of all granule objects detected within the nucleus region in square micrometers (µm²).
Mean of the individual granule mean intensities for all granules within the nucleus region.
Mean circularity of all granule objects detected within the nucleus region. Circularity ranges 0 (elongated) to 1 (perfect circle).
Mean solidity of all granule objects detected within the nucleus region. Solidity is the ratio of the object area to its convex hull area (0 to 1).
Unique numeric identifier per image tile. Calculated as i multiplied by 100000 plus the tile number where i is the index of the selected node.
Globally unique cell identifier across all images and tiles. Calculated as CellID plus 100000 multiplied by the running tile counter.
Name of the parent container (e.g. well plate name). Set to n/a if no parent exists.
